author: Yaakov M Nemoy
text: Spec 009-communication.md exists with REQ-COM-001 through REQ-COM-007 covering bubbling, lateral comms, direct-to-user, question classification, notification mode, and message protocol. ADR still needed.

author: Yaakov M Nemoy
text: Token budget specs exist in 006-lifecycle.md (REQ-LCM-002 through REQ-LCM-004) and 020-servitor-trees.md (REQ-TRE-005 token budget inheritance). Fine-tuning parameters not yet determined.

author: Yaakov M Nemoy
text: Spec exists in 005-spawning.md — REQ-SPN-001 lists model selection as optional summon parameter. 017-v1-scope.md confirms. PRD backfill still incomplete — only mentioned in spec-notes, not formal PRD sections.

author: Yaakov M Nemoy
text: Spec 008-deterministic-shell.md exists with REQ-DET-001 (prompt composition) and REQ-DET-002 (passthrough display). Full specification of deterministic prompt construction, context windows, invariant enforcement.

author: Yaakov M Nemoy
text: Capability delegation spec 021 is complete (80+ requirements). 009-communication.md REQ-COM-002 requires capabilities for lateral comms. 020-servitor-trees.md REQ-TRE-006 gates cross-tree communication. Privacy aspect remains TBD per spec-notes.

author: Yaakov M Nemoy
text: Spec exists in 005-spawning.md REQ-SPN-004 through REQ-SPN-008 covering naming themes, tier depletion, and cycling rules. Detailed implementation notes in spec-notes.md lines 100-109.

author: Yaakov M Nemoy
text: Partial spec in 007-operating-modes.md — REQ-OPM-005 covers parent-controlled notification mode. Spec-notes line 193 flags this needs separate deeper work. Listed as pinned decision #2 in 000-index.md.

author: Yaakov M Nemoy
text: Spec 021-capability-delegation.md is complete. Line 15 explicitly notes PRD backfill needed. PRD v1 only partially mentions capabilities in section 4.1 (Agent Types).

author: Yaakov M Nemoy
text: Pulsing animation exists in StateIndicator (ServitorListTileView lines 197-252) for .working state. Transitions between states (idle→working→done) are instantaneous — smooth color transitions not yet implemented.

author: Yaakov M Nemoy
text: EditDescriptionSheet is already a separate struct presented as .sheet() modal (ServitorListTileView lines 61-67, 73-125). May just need extraction to its own file for reusability.

author: Yaakov M Nemoy
text: Permission infrastructure exists: PermissionMode (5 modes), PermissionStore (UserDefaults), PermissionManager (enforcement). Default mode is .plan for servitors. Missing: debug-mode-specific conditional configuration and tests for debug/test mode defaults.

author: Yaakov M Nemoy
text: Tool-use tests exist in JakeIntegrationTests (3 tests) and SDKLiveIntegrationTests (15 tests). Gaps: tool argument validation, multi-turn tool sequences (maxTurns=1 limitation), no Ollama integration tests.

author: Yaakov M Nemoy
text: Pipeline documented in docs/pipeline.md (updated Feb 7, 2026). Incremental Update Flow section describes manual workflow. Not automated — propagation is intentionally manual per design. The 3 slash commands (/spec-status, /trace, /audit-spec) provide verification tooling.
